Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We should focus on Missing details Decision criteria Roles and responsibilities Timing and sequencing Exception handling

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets break down the process and identify areas that might need clarification

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Initial Contact and Documentation Review Property Database Entry Assigning a Property Manager Introductory Meeting Property Inspection and Marketing Activation and Tenant Screening Lease Finalization and Move in Quality Checks and Audits Communication and Exception Handling Overall Process

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What exactly happens when the property coordinator finds missing or outdated documents How long do they wait for the landlord to provide updates Are there any specific deadlines or time frames for the documentation phase What are the consequences if the landlord doesnt provide the required documents

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What is the process for entering property details Is it manual or automated Who is responsible for accuracy How often is the database updated during the onboarding process

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How are the factors workload geography experience track record weighted when assigning a manager What if no manager meets all the criteria What is the fallback How is the managers workload measured What tools are used

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How are special conditions or policies pets maintenance payment documented and followed up What if the landlord and property manager disagree on a policy

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How are photographers and inspectors selected How are their schedules coordinated Who pays for repairs if the property fails inspection Is it always the landlord How are market trends incorporated into pricing Who decides on the final price What if the landlord disagrees with the marketing materials or pricing

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How long does the activation take What does it involve beyond making the listing live What criteria are used for tenant screening How are multiple applications handled How are lease negotiations conducted What are typical promotional discounts What if a tenants application is borderline What exceptions might occur

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What is the timeline from lease finalization to move in Are there standard periods How are security deposits handled What are the companys policies

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: What are the quality checks How are they scheduled What happens if an audit finds an issue How are discrepancies resolved How does the IT department verify system integration What are common issues

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How are communications tracked What tools are used How is the information shared among stakeholders What are common exceptions such as special insurance custom lease clauses and how are they handled How do regional offices coordinate with each other and with the central office

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: How long does the entire onboarding process typically take What are the key performance indicators for the onboarding process Are there any process bottlenecks or areas for improvement identified

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we formulate these into open ended questions

Name: Validation - PE
Text: These questions are open ended and aim to clarify the process without delving into technical implementation
